title: Phone and CarPlay agree on the current occurrence and next movement
purpose: Project both surfaces from one navigation snapshot instead of maintaining two route-progress states.

limitations: This is a platform-light presentation contract, not a CPMapTemplate or physical head-unit test.

guidance.japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

ja-JP.display_text: 左側を進み、B 湾岸線・横浜方面へ
ja-JP.spoken_text: B 湾岸線、横浜方面へ
ja-JP.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

zh-Hans.display_text: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线・横滨方向
zh-Hans.spoken_text: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线，横滨方向
zh-Hans.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

en.display_text: Keep left for Route B toward Yokohama
en.spoken_text: Keep left for Route B toward Yokohama
en.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.current_occurrence_id
then.rationale: The phone projection reads the shared current occurrence.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.current_occurrence_id
then.rationale: CarPlay reads the same occurrence rather than maintaining its own progress.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.next_movement_occurrence_id
then.rationale: The next branch is occurrence-scoped on the phone.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.next_movement_occurrence_id
then.rationale: CarPlay must show the same next branch occurrence.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.primary
then.rationale: Connection changes presentation ownership, not navigation state.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.primary
then.rationale: The phone can remain a companion without becoming a second navigation authority.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.guidance.prompt_id
then.rationale: Prompt identity is part of the shared occurrence-scoped frame.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.guidance.prompt_id
then.rationale: CarPlay cannot schedule an independent prompt.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.guidance.distance_meters
then.rationale: The phone displays the frame's semantic distance.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.guidance.distance_meters
then.rationale: CarPlay receives the identical distance value.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.guidance.maneuver
then.rationale: The phone does not infer a maneuver from prose.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.guidance.maneuver
then.rationale: CarPlay consumes the same structured maneuver.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.guidance.lane_preparation
then.rationale: Lane preparation is structured separately from the maneuver.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.guidance.lane_preparation
then.rationale: The vehicle display cannot invent a different lane target.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.guidance.decision_point_name_ja
then.rationale: The physical decision-point name remains Japanese and identical across adapters.
